slides.title: The heart risk you *inherit*, not earn
slides.sub: Lipoprotein(a) is a particle written into your DNA. One test, once, tells you if you carry it.

slides.title: Meet lipoprotein(a)
slides.body: Often called Lp(a), it is a cholesterol particle your genes set. It is *separate from* the LDL most cholesterol tests report.

slides.title: It raises risk quietly
slides.body: High Lp(a) *is linked to* earlier heart attacks and strokes. It can stay hidden even when your standard panel looks fine.

slides.title: Set for life
slides.body: Diet and exercise barely move it. Your level is *largely fixed at birth* and stays steady across your adult years.

slides.title: Test once, know forever
slides.body: A single blood test reveals your number. Because it rarely changes, *one result* can guide decisions for decades.

slides.title: Know your number
slides.body: If it is high, you can act earlier on every factor you control: blood pressure, LDL, movement and *the habits around them*.

slides.title: Control what you *can* control.
slides.body: Lp(a) is fixed, but your daily habits are not. Vibe Health scores your sleep, food, movement and steps into one number that protects your heart.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Some heart risk you inherit. Lipoprotein(a) is written into your DNA, and one blood test can tell you if you carry it. 🧬❤️

It is set for life, diet barely moves it, and a standard cholesterol panel can miss it. So test once, know your number, and act early on everything you can control. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits that protect your heart into one daily score → link in bio.
